title: Squid Game
description: Hundreds of cash-strapped players accept a strange invitation to compete in children's games. Inside, a tempting prize awaits — with deadly high stakes. A gripping South Korean survival drama that took the world by storm.

title: Vincenzo
description: Park Joo Hyeong, adopted at eight and raised in Italy as Vincenzo Cassano, is a Mafia consigliere. Due to warring factions, he returns to South Korea and takes on a ruthless conglomerate with his own brand of justice.

title: Sweet Home
description: As humans turn into savage monsters and the world plunges into terror, a handful of survivors fight for their lives — and to hold on to their humanity. Based on the popular webtoon of the same name.

title: Flower of Evil
description: Hiding a twisted past, a man maintains his facade as the perfect husband to his detective wife — until she begins investigating a series of murders that could unravel everything he has built.

title: Lawless Lawyer
description: Driven by the desire to avenge his mother, a former gangster turned lawyer uses both his fists and the loopholes in law to fight against those with absolute power in a corrupt city.

title: Parasite
description: All unemployed, Ki-taek's family takes peculiar interest in the wealthy and glamorous Parks for their livelihood until they get entangled in an unexpected incident. The Oscar-winning masterpiece by Bong Joon-ho.

title: The Call
description: Connected by phone in the same home but 20 years apart, a caller puts a woman's past — and life — on the line to change her own fate in this mind-bending Korean thriller.

title: The Witch
description: Ja-yoon is a high school student who struggles with memory loss after enduring unknown childhood trauma. While uncovering the truth, she is dragged into a world of crime and dangerous secrets.

title: #Alive
description: As a grisly virus rampages a city, a lone man stays locked inside his apartment, digitally cut off from seeking help and desperate to find a way out alive in this Korean zombie thriller.

title: Train to Busan
description: When a zombie virus pushes Korea into a state of emergency, those trapped on an express train to Busan must fight for their own survival. A heart-pounding action-horror classic.
